---
species: "Nucella lapillus"
accepted_code: "NULA"
alternate_codes: 
diminutive:
alternate_diminutives: 
common_name: "Dog whelk"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "cone shaped solid white or brown shell " 
image: '/header_images/Nucella_lapillus.jpg'
image_credit: 'Photo from Julius Ellrich via [WORMS](https://images.marinespecies.org/thumbs/126604_dogwhelk-feeding-on-barnacles.jpg?w=700)'
categories:
  - gastropods
sampling_programs:
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
habitat:
  - intertidal
mobility:
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 140403
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** can grow up to 6cm, short pointed spire and spiral ridges, thick aperture with tooth like ridges, prefers intertidal zone.
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->


**[WORMS page](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=140403)**
